title: Ingest pasted text
content:
# Pasted Note

NotebookLM 应支持直接粘贴内容并完成标准化、分块和索引。

## 关键要求

- 保持结构
- 避免丢段落
- 提供可检索块

title: Ingest long markdown
content:
# Long Markdown

LangChain supports agents, retrieval, tools, and memory for production notebooks.

## Section A

A robust ingest system should preserve structure, preserve headings, and keep semantic context in each chunk. In research workflows, a single source is often reused for search, summary, and grounded chat, so parsing quality directly affects downstream answer quality. Reliable chunk boundaries reduce retrieval drift and improve citation precision.

A robust ingest system should preserve structure, preserve headings, and keep semantic context in each chunk. In research workflows, a single source is often reused for search, summary, and grounded chat, so parsing quality directly affects downstream answer quality. Reliable chunk boundaries reduce retrieval drift and improve citation precision.

A robust ingest system should preserve structure, preserve headings, and keep semantic context in each chunk. In research workflows, a single source is often reused for search, summary, and grounded chat, so parsing quality directly affects downstream answer quality. Reliable chunk boundaries reduce retrieval drift and improve citation precision.

## Section B

Notebook research requires stable normalization, deterministic markdown output, and predictable indexing behavior. Without stable normalization, repeated ingest of the same article can produce inconsistent outlines and inconsistent retrieval chunks. This weakens ranking and causes poor user trust in recommendations and citations.

Notebook research requires stable normalization, deterministic markdown output, and predictable indexing behavior. Without stable normalization, repeated ingest of the same article can produce inconsistent outlines and inconsistent retrieval chunks. This weakens ranking and causes poor user trust in recommendations and citations.

Notebook research requires stable normalization, deterministic markdown output, and predictable indexing behavior. Without stable normalization, repeated ingest of the same article can produce inconsistent outlines and inconsistent retrieval chunks. This weakens ranking and causes poor user trust in recommendations and citations.

## Section C

Evaluation should capture parse quality, chunk coherence, and indexing health with explicit metrics. Practical metrics include parse success rate, markdown length, heading fidelity, chunk count, chunk token distribution, and embedding coverage. These metrics should be stable across reruns and resistant to noisy provider responses.

Evaluation should capture parse quality, chunk coherence, and indexing health with explicit metrics. Practical metrics include parse success rate, markdown length, heading fidelity, chunk count, chunk token distribution, and embedding coverage. These metrics should be stable across reruns and resistant to noisy provider responses.

Evaluation should capture parse quality, chunk coherence, and indexing health with explicit metrics. Practical metrics include parse success rate, markdown length, heading fidelity, chunk count, chunk token distribution, and embedding coverage. These metrics should be stable across reruns and resistant to noisy provider responses.

## Section D

When documents are long, map-reduce summarization and retrieval-aware chunking can reduce latency and improve answer quality. However, excessive compression can remove key evidence. A balanced design retains important sections, keeps source traceability, and records enough metadata for downstream re-ranking.

When documents are long, map-reduce summarization and retrieval-aware chunking can reduce latency and improve answer quality. However, excessive compression can remove key evidence. A balanced design retains important sections, keeps source traceability, and records enough metadata for downstream re-ranking.

When documents are long, map-reduce summarization and retrieval-aware chunking can reduce latency and improve answer quality. However, excessive compression can remove key evidence. A balanced design retains important sections, keeps source traceability, and records enough metadata for downstream re-ranking.

## Section E

Well-structured markdown improves summary quality, chat grounding quality, and source recommendation quality. In production systems, the ingest layer is not only a parser but also a quality gate that protects every downstream feature.

Well-structured markdown improves summary quality, chat grounding quality, and source recommendation quality. In production systems, the ingest layer is not only a parser but also a quality gate that protects every downstream feature.

title: Ingest PDF basic text
content:
Research Findings on Document Ingestion

This PDF contains structured research content about AI systems and NLP. The ingest pipeline must extract embedded text, normalize it to markdown, and produce at least one indexable chunk for downstream retrieval and summarization.

title: Ingest rich HTML with tables, lists, and code
content:
系统架构

核心组件

  • 解析引擎：负责 HTML / PDF / Markdown 的解析与规范化
  • 向量索引：将分块文本嵌入并写入向量数据库
  • 检索层：负责语义搜索与混合排序

性能基准

指标目标值当前值
解析吞吐量100 doc/s87 doc/s
端到端延迟500ms320ms
向量写入 P95200ms180ms

核心代码示例

async def ingest(session, ingest_input):
    content = await fetch(ingest_input)
    markdown = normalize(content)
    chunks = chunk(markdown)
    await index(session, chunks)
    return IngestResult(chunks=chunks)

注意事项

上述性能数据来自压测环境，生产环境以实际监控数据为准。富文本结构（表格、列表、代码块）均需完整保留以支持下游引用。

title: 中文专题文章摄入
content:
# 大语言模型的应用前景

近年来，以 GPT、Claude 为代表的大语言模型在自然语言理解、代码生成和知识问答方面取得了显著进展。这些模型通过在海量文本上预训练，具备了强大的语言理解与生成能力。

## 技术挑战

当前模型面临幻觉问题、长上下文处理能力不足以及推理成本高昂等挑战。研究者正在探索检索增强生成（RAG）、思维链提示（CoT）和基于人类反馈的强化学习（RLHF）等方法来应对这些问题。

## 典型应用场景

大语言模型已在教育辅导、医疗咨询、法律检索和软件开发等多个垂直领域落地应用，展现出良好的商业化潜力。以 Notebook 类产品为例，用户可以将多个文档作为知识来源，通过自然语言与文档进行交互式问答。

## 未来展望

随着多模态能力的提升和推理效率的优化，大语言模型有望成为各行业数字化转型的核心基础设施。高质量的文档摄入与索引能力是实现这一愿景的重要前提。

title: Ingest minimal content
content: Brief note. Testing minimal ingestion path with very short content to verify boundary handling.

title: Bilingual Chinese-English content
content:
# AI Research Summary / AI 研究摘要

This document summarizes recent advances in AI research. 本文总结了人工智能领域的最新研究进展。

## Key Findings / 主要发现

Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) significantly improves factual accuracy of large language models. 检索增强生成技术显著提升了大语言模型的事实准确性，减少了模型幻觉。

Fine-tuning on domain-specific data reduces hallucination rates by up to 40%. 在领域特定数据上进行微调可将幻觉率降低多达 40%。

## Methodology / 研究方法

We evaluated 12 models across 5 benchmarks using both English and Chinese test sets. 我们在 5 个基准测试集上评估了 12 个模型，测试集同时包含英文和中文样本。

## Conclusion / 结论

Multilingual content must be normalized without loss of information from either language. The ingest pipeline should handle code-switching gracefully. 多语言内容应在不损失任何语言信息的前提下完成规范化处理，摄入管道需优雅地支持语码转换场景。

title: Ingest deep heading hierarchy
content:
# Level 1: System Overview

This document tests multi-level heading preservation across four heading depths.

## Level 2: Architecture

The system is composed of an ingest layer, a retrieval layer, and a generation layer.

### Level 3: Ingest Layer

The ingest layer handles document fetching, parsing, normalization, chunking, and vector indexing.

#### Level 4: Chunking Strategy

Chunks are bounded by semantic boundaries. Each chunk carries a heading breadcrumb to preserve context. Chunk size targets 400–600 tokens to balance retrieval precision and context completeness.

### Level 3: Retrieval Layer

The retrieval layer uses hybrid search combining dense vector similarity with sparse BM25 scoring.

## Level 2: Evaluation

All heading levels must be preserved in the normalized markdown output to maintain document structure fidelity for downstream citation and navigation.

title: Ingest technical content with code blocks
content:
# Technical Integration Guide

This document contains inline code snippets and fenced code blocks that must survive the ingest pipeline intact.

## Installation

Install the package with `pip install notebooklm-sdk`. Requires Python 3.10 or higher.

## Quick Start

```python
from notebooklm import Notebook

# Create a new notebook and add a source
nb = Notebook.create(title="My Research")
nb.add_source(url="https://example.com/paper.pdf")

# Run a semantic search
results = nb.search(query="key findings", top_k=5)
for r in results:
    print(r.text, r.score)
```

## Configuration

Set `OPENAI_API_KEY` and `DATABASE_URL` in your `.env` file. The default chunk size is `512` tokens and can be overridden via `CHUNK_SIZE`.

## Important Notes

Code blocks must not be merged with surrounding prose during chunking. Preserving code integrity is critical for technical documentation indexing and citation. Inline code like `nb.search()` should also survive normalization without escaping.
